channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Calgary Hosts Inclusive Fun Day for Children with Special Needs
item.description: In Calgary, children with special needs were treated to a day of activities and entertainment designed to celebrate their abilities and provide a welcoming environment for families. Organizers arrange...

item.title: Iranian Parliament Considers Large Bounties on Trump and Netanyahu Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: Iran's parliament is reportedly considering a bill that would authorise a £43.5 million reward for anyone who assassinates former US President Donald Trump or Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu...

item.title: Atlantic columnist questions media scrutiny of Trump's age compared to Biden
item.description: An article in The Atlantic, highlighted by Fox News, claims that President Donald Trump's age and stamina are not receiving the same level of scrutiny that former President Joe Biden faced. Jonathan L...

item.title: Crichton Aims to Bounce Back for NSW Despite Recent Form Dip
item.description: Stephen Crichton, the Canterbury Bulldogs captain, is preparing for State of Origin I despite struggling with form after a severe shoulder injury in round five. The grade-five AC joint injury sideline...

item.title: Western Cape dam levels rise above 70% amid storm recovery efforts
item.description: Following a series of severe storms earlier this month, dam levels across the Western Cape have risen sharply to over 70%, up from 52.46% last week. The province faced heavy rainfall between 150mm and...

item.title: US Congress links Trump to efforts protecting Nigerian Christians from extremist attacks
item.description: US Congressman Riley Moore don yarn say President Donald Trump dey put serious mind on the protection of Christians for Nigeria, especially after dem carry out joint operation wey kill ISIS big man, A...

item.title: Former British soldier imprisoned in Russia expresses feelings of neglect and lack of support
item.description: Hayden Davies, a former British soldier, has been sentenced to 15 years in a Russian maximum-security prison after being captured in Ukraine while serving in the Ukrainian army's foreign legion. Convi...

item.title: Gabby Logan discusses honesty with her children after revealing past infidelity
item.description: Gabby Logan, the renowned television presenter, shared on HELLO!'s Second Act Podcast that her 20-year-old daughter, Lois, was 'horrified' after reading her memoir in which she admitted to cheating on...

item.title: Lion CEO applies tech industry strategies to boost innovation in beer and beverages
item.description: Anubha Sahasrabuddhe, the CEO of Lion in Australia and New Zealand, has drawn inspiration from the technology sector to reshape the way she drives innovation in the beverage industry. Earlier in her c...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte's lawyers to submit formal response to Senate impeachment court
item.description: The legal team of Vice President Sara Duterte has confirmed that they will comply with the summons issued by the Senate, which has convened as an impeachment court for her trial. Lawyer Michael Poa, s...

item.title: Rachel Maddow Highlights Potential Conflicts in Trump's Stock Trades and Public Statements
item.description: During her show, Rachel Maddow focused on President Donald Trump's recent financial disclosures, pointing out a concerning pattern in his stock trades. Maddow highlighted that several trades coincided...

item.title: President Ruto meets stakeholders to discuss measures on high fuel costs
item.description: President William Ruto has held a crisis meeting with oil marketers and transport sector stakeholders following nationwide protests over high fuel prices. Deputy President Kithure Kindiki confirmed th...

item.title: NPA Suspends Prosecutor After Court Cancels Sibanyoni Case
item.description: The National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) has announced the suspension of a prosecutor involved in the extortion and money laundering case against Joe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni and others. This follows the K...

item.title: Rod Stewart Hints at Retirement Following 2027 UK Tour
item.description: Rod Stewart, the legendary British singer-songwriter, has indicated that he may retire from touring after completing his UK dates in 2027. Turning 81 this January, Stewart has been performing for over...

item.title: Zamfara Governor forms committee to celebrate three years of Rescue Administration
item.description: Governor Dauda Lawal of Zamfara State don approve one 10-member committee wey go dey in charge of planning and coordinating activities for the third anniversary celebration of him 'Rescue Administrati...

item.title: Ebola Outbreak in Central Africa Declared International Health Emergency
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has declared an international health emergency in several African countries following a surge in Ebola cases, primarily driven by the Bundibugyo strain. This strain...

item.title: Two women in custody for murder of elderly woman in Ngcobo linked to witchcraft accusations
item.description: In a tragic incident in Ngcobo, Eastern Cape, two women have been arrested for the murder of 75-year-old Nokhansala Sidiki, who was accused of practising witchcraft. According to police spokesperson B...

item.title: Dela Rosa’s Legal Team Argues He Remains Within Philippine Jurisdiction Amid ICC Warrant
item.description: The legal team of Senator Ronald 'Bato' Dela Rosa has insisted that he should not be considered a fugitive from justice, countering claims from the Office of the Solicitor General (OSG) that the fugit...

item.title: Cyprus Environment Commissioner Urges Stop to Akamas Road Expansion Over Ecological Concerns
item.description: Environment Commissioner Antonia Theodosiou has formally requested that the Baths of Aphrodite-Fontana Amorosa roadwork project in Akamas be immediately halted and that its environmental approval be w...

item.title: Manila Police Investigate Nine Labor Day Protesters for Alleged Violations Including Assault and Unauthorized Assembly
item.description: The Manila Police District is currently investigating nine individuals who participated in Labor Day protests for various alleged public order violations. According to police reports, demonstrators al...
